name: avanzare
description: AVANZARE - resume screening assistant for recruiters

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @avanzare/engine && npm run typecheck -w @avanzare/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @avanzare/engine && npm run dev -w @avanzare/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @avanzare/engine && npm run build -w @avanzare/desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build -w @avanzare/engine && npm run dist -w @avanzare/desktop
